old: import { TriwebChartHoverController } from '../shared/triweb-chart-hover.helper';

old:
<div
                class="triweb-chart-hover-wrap"
                (mouseleave)="onChartMouseLeave('dailyProduction', dailyProductionChart)"
            >
            <dx-chart
                #dailyProductionChart
                [dataSource]="dailyProduction"
                [palette]="triwebPalette"

                (onPointHoverChanged)="onChartPointHoverChanged('dailyProduction', $event)"
                style="height: 340px; width: 100%;"
            >
new:
<div
                class="triweb-chart-hover-wrap"
                [class.chart-focus-mode]="isSeriesFocusActive('dailyProduction')"
                (mouseleave)="onChartMouseLeave('dailyProduction', dailyProductionChart)"
            >
            <dx-chart
                #dailyProductionChart
                [dataSource]="dailyProduction"
                [palette]="triwebPalette"
                (onPointHoverChanged)="onChartPointHoverChanged('dailyProduction', $event)"
                (onLegendClick)="onSeriesFocusLegendClick('dailyProduction', $event)"
                style="height: 340px; width: 100%;"
            >

new:
